title: Advanced Tactics - The Fork
description: Learn how to attack two pieces at once

steps.title: Discover the Fork
steps.instruction: Find a move that threatens two enemy pieces simultaneously.
steps.explanation: A fork forces the opponent to save only one piece, allowing you to capture the other.
steps.teaching_moment: Look for pieces that control both side and vertex lines at the same time.
steps.learningObjective: Develop tactical vision on the triangular grid.
